title: Xiaopeng Unveils TuringViT Vision Encoder: Uses Only One-Tenth of the Data and Leaves the SOTA Baseline in the Dust
excerpt: Visual large models have long been held back by an invisible barrier: to achieve top-tier performance, one must first accumulate massive data and computing powe
content_html:
Visual large models have long been held back by an invisible barrier: to achieve top-tier performance, one must first accumulate massive data and computing power, making advanced visual capabilities a luxury of a few leading teams. On July 21, XPeng Group launched TuringViT, an efficient visual encoder, claiming that it systematically restructured the visual encoder from architecture, data paradigms, to training processes, providing the industry with a reproducible, low-cost SOTA-level visual Transformer training path, bringing advanced visual large models from exclusive use by top teams to widespread accessibility across the industry.

The positioning of TuringViT is clear: facing the era of VLM and VLA, it fully supports three business scenarios—intelligent driving, smart cockpit, and IRON humanoid robots. It breaks through in three dimensions—architecture, data, and training—building a technical system dominated by linear attention, high-quality data governance, and native dynamic resolution, achieving threefold improvements in performance, efficiency, and practicality.

In terms of architecture, TuringViT offers two specifications. TuringViT-18L includes three Turing Blocks, totaling 15 TLA layers plus 3 MHA layers, focusing on efficient deployment under dynamic resolution; TuringViT-24L includes four Turing Blocks, totaling 20 TLA layers plus 4 MHA layers, further enhancing representation capabilities while maintaining linear computation as the mainstay. Test data shows that as input resolution increases, TuringViT's latency growth curve is much flatter than that of standard softmax ViT, with more significant efficiency advantages at high resolutions. At a 1536x1536 resolution, the inference throughput of TuringViT-18L reaches 3.04 times that of Seed1.5-ViT and 2.16 times that of SigLIP2-ViT-L, clearing the core obstacles for edge deployment of high-resolution perception, multi-camera input, and long-time video processing.

Different from the industry's crude approach of increasing data scale, the true sharpness of TuringViT lies in data governance. It has developed the VISTA-Curation multimodal data governance pipeline, no longer pursuing more data but instead achieving a level-up in data efficiency by enhancing the supervisory value of each sample. For image-text data, the pipeline finely screens in three steps: first filtering out low-resolution, blurry, or low-texture poor-quality images; then generating diverse candidate captions using multiple models and prompts and cross-validating visual consistency; finally, scoring comprehensively based on relative image-text alignment, text information volume, and ambiguity in a unified comparison pool, selecting high-visual-fitting, high-semantic-density annotations and eliminating ambiguous, generalizable, and weakly aligned samples. For video data, the pipeline first splits long videos into continuous short segments and uniformly samples representative frames, then uses semantic and motion consistency to filter and retain effective segments. Finally, it combines local frame-level detail captions with global temporal semantic captions to generate video annotations with transformation perception ability, enabling the model to learn more robust visual representations from continuous scenes.

The improvement in data efficiency directly reflects in the results. TuringViT used only 0.85B image-text pairs, about one-tenth of the data scale used to train SigLIP2-L, yet achieved an average accuracy of 83.6% on six zero-shot classification benchmarks such as ImageNet-1K, surpassing mainstream open-source baselines trained on 10B data. It also showed significant advantages in image-text retrieval tasks on COCO and Flickr30K, truly achieving breakthroughs by obtaining better results with one-tenth of the data.

In the training process, TuringViT adopts a four-phase progressive native dynamic resolution training paradigm, adapting to the input characteristics of downstream VLM and VLA from the first day of pre-training, completely moving away from the traditional mode of fixed-resolution pre-training followed by post-hoc adaptation.

At a 1536x1536 resolution, the inference throughput of TuringViT-18L reaches 3.04 times that of Seed1.5-ViT and 2.16 times that of SigLIP2-ViT-L, clearing the core obstacles for edge deployment of high-resolution perception, multi-camera input, and long-time video processing.

sentences.en: In terms of architecture, TuringViT offers two specifications.
sentences.zh: 在架构方面，TuringViT提供了两种规格。

sentences.en: TuringViT-18L includes three Turing Blocks, totaling 15 TLA layers plus 3 MHA layers, focusing on efficient deployment under dynamic resolution; TuringViT-24L includes four Turing Blocks, totaling 20 TLA layers plus 4 MHA layers, further enhancing representation capabilities while maintaining linear computation as the mainstay.
sentences.zh: TuringViT-18L包含3个Turing Block，共计15个TLA层加3个MHA层，专注于动态分辨率下的高效部署； TuringViT-24L包括四个Turing Block，总共20个TLA层加上4个MHA层，在保持线性计算为主的同时进一步增强表示能力。

sentences.en: Test data shows that as input resolution increases, TuringViT's latency growth curve is much flatter than that of standard softmax ViT, with more significant efficiency advantages at high resolutions.
sentences.zh: 测试数据显示，随着输入分辨率的提高，TuringViT的延迟增长曲线比标准softmax ViT平坦得多，在高分辨率下具有更显着的效率优势。

sentences.en: At a 1536x1536 resolution, the inference throughput of TuringViT-18L reaches 3.04 times that of Seed1.5-ViT and 2.16 times that of SigLIP2-ViT-L, clearing the core obstacles for edge deployment of high-resolution perception, multi-camera input, and long-time video processing.
sentences.zh: 在1536x1536分辨率下，TuringViT-18L的推理吞吐量达到Seed1.5-ViT的3.04倍，SigLIP2-ViT-L的2.16倍，为高分辨率感知、多摄像头输入和长时间视频处理的边缘部署扫清了核心障碍。

blocks.html_en: Different from the industry's crude approach of increasing data scale, the true sharpness of TuringViT lies in data governance. It has developed the VISTA-Curation multimodal data governance pipeline, no longer pursuing more data but instead achieving a level-up in data efficiency by enhancing the supervisory value of each sample. For image-text data, the pipeline finely screens in three steps: first filtering out low-resolution, blurry, or low-texture poor-quality images; then generating diverse candidate captions using multiple models and prompts and cross-validating visual consistency; finally, scoring comprehensively based on relative image-text alignment, text information volume, and ambiguity in a unified comparison pool, selecting high-visual-fitting, high-semantic-density annotations and eliminating ambiguous, generalizable, and weakly aligned samples. For video data, the pipeline first splits long videos into continuous short segments and uniformly samples representative frames, then uses semantic and motion consistency to filter and retain effective segments. Finally, it combines local frame-level detail captions with global temporal semantic captions to generate video annotations with transformation perception ability, enabling the model to learn more robust visual representations from continuous scenes.

sentences.en: Different from the industry's crude approach of increasing data scale, the true sharpness of TuringViT lies in data governance.
sentences.zh: 与业界粗暴地增加数据规模不同，TuringViT的真正犀利之处在于数据治理。

sentences.en: It has developed the VISTA-Curation multimodal data governance pipeline, no longer pursuing more data but instead achieving a level-up in data efficiency by enhancing the supervisory value of each sample.
sentences.zh: 开发了VISTA-Curation多模态数据治理流程，不再追求更多数据，而是通过增强每个样本的监管价值来实现数据效率的提升。

sentences.en: For image-text data, the pipeline finely screens in three steps: first filtering out low-resolution, blurry, or low-texture poor-quality images; then generating diverse candidate captions using multiple models and prompts and cross-validating visual consistency; finally, scoring comprehensively based on relative image-text alignment, text information volume, and ambiguity in a unified comparison pool, selecting high-visual-fitting, high-semantic-density annotations and eliminating ambiguous, generalizable, and weakly aligned samples.
sentences.zh: 对于图文数据，该管道分三步进行精细筛选：首先过滤掉低分辨率、模糊或低纹理的劣质图像；然后使用多个模型和提示生成不同的候选字幕并交叉验证视觉一致性；最后，在统一的比较池中根据图文相对对齐、文本信息量、歧义度等进行综合评分，选择视觉贴合度高、语义密度高的标注，剔除歧义性、泛化性、对齐性弱的样本。

sentences.en: For video data, the pipeline first splits long videos into continuous short segments and uniformly samples representative frames, then uses semantic and motion consistency to filter and retain effective segments.
sentences.zh: 对于视频数据，管道首先将长视频分割成连续的短片段，并对代表性帧进行统一采样，然后使用语义和运动一致性来过滤和保留有效片段。

sentences.en: Finally, it combines local frame-level detail captions with global temporal semantic captions to generate video annotations with transformation perception ability, enabling the model to learn more robust visual representations from continuous scenes.
sentences.zh: 最后，它将局部帧级细节字幕与全局时间语义字幕相结合，生成具有变换感知能力的视频注释，使模型能够从连续场景中学习更鲁棒的视觉表示。

blocks.html_en: The improvement in data efficiency directly reflects in the results. TuringViT used only 0.85B image-text pairs, about one-tenth of the data scale used to train SigLIP2-L, yet achieved an average accuracy of 83.6% on six zero-shot classification benchmarks such as ImageNet-1K, surpassing mainstream open-source baselines trained on 10B data. It also showed significant advantages in image-text retrieval tasks on COCO and Flickr30K, truly achieving breakthroughs by obtaining better results with one-tenth of the data.

sentences.en: The improvement in data efficiency directly reflects in the results.
sentences.zh: 数据效率的提升直接体现在结果上。

sentences.en: TuringViT used only 0.85B image-text pairs, about one-tenth of the data scale used to train SigLIP2-L, yet achieved an average accuracy of 83.6% on six zero-shot classification benchmarks such as ImageNet-1K, surpassing mainstream open-source baselines trained on 10B data.
sentences.zh: TuringViT 仅使用了 0.85B 图像文本对，约为训练 SigLIP2-L 所用数据规模的十分之一，但在 ImageNet-1K 等六个零样本分类基准上实现了 83.6% 的平均准确率，超过了在 10B 数据上训练的主流开源基线。

sentences.en: It also showed significant advantages in image-text retrieval tasks on COCO and Flickr30K, truly achieving breakthroughs by obtaining better results with one-tenth of the data.
sentences.zh: 在COCO和Flickr30K上的图文检索任务中也表现出了显着的优势，真正实现了用十分之一的数据获得更好的结果的突破。

blocks.html_en: In the training process, TuringViT adopts a four-phase progressive native dynamic resolution training paradigm, adapting to the input characteristics of downstream VLM and VLA from the first day of pre-training, completely moving away from the traditional mode of fixed-resolution pre-training followed by post-hoc adaptation.

sentences.en: In the training process, TuringViT adopts a four-phase progressive native dynamic resolution training paradigm, adapting to the input characteristics of downstream VLM and VLA from the first day of pre-training, completely moving away from the traditional mode of fixed-resolution pre-training followed by post-hoc adaptation.
sentences.zh: 在训练过程中，TuringViT采用四阶段渐进式原生动态分辨率训练范式，从预训练的第一天开始适应下游VLM和VLA的输入特性，彻底摆脱了固定分辨率预训练然后事后适应的传统模式。

content_html_zh:
视觉大模型长期以来一直被一个无形的障碍所阻碍：要达到顶级的性能，首先必须积累海量的数据和计算能力，使得先进的视觉能力成为少数领先团队的奢侈。 7月21日，小鹏集团推出高效视觉编码器TuringViT，声称其从架构、数据范式到训练流程对视觉编码器进行了系统重构，为业界提供了可复制、低成本的SOTA级视觉Transformer训练路径，让先进的视觉大模型从顶级团队专属走向全行业广泛普及。

TuringViT的定位很明确：面向VLM和VLA时代，全面支持智能驾驶、智能座舱、IRON仿人机器人三大业务场景。 它从架构、数据、训练三个维度进行突破，构建了以线性注意力、高质量数据治理、原生动态解析为主导的技术体系，实现了性能、效率和实用性的三倍提升。

在架构方面，TuringViT提供了两种规格。 TuringViT-18L包含3个Turing Block，共计15个TLA层加3个MHA层，专注于动态分辨率下的高效部署； TuringViT-24L包括四个Turing Block，总共20个TLA层加上4个MHA层，在保持线性计算为主的同时进一步增强表示能力。 测试数据显示，随着输入分辨率的提高，TuringViT的延迟增长曲线比标准softmax ViT平坦得多，在高分辨率下具有更显着的效率优势。 在1536x1536分辨率下，TuringViT-18L的推理吞吐量达到Seed1.5-ViT的3.04倍，SigLIP2-ViT-L的2.16倍，为高分辨率感知、多摄像头输入和长时间视频处理的边缘部署扫清了核心障碍。

与业界粗暴地增加数据规模不同，TuringViT的真正犀利之处在于数据治理。 开发了VISTA-Curation多模态数据治理流程，不再追求更多数据，而是通过增强每个样本的监管价值来实现数据效率的提升。 对于图文数据，该管道分三步进行精细筛选：首先过滤掉低分辨率、模糊或低纹理的劣质图像；然后使用多个模型和提示生成不同的候选字幕并交叉验证视觉一致性；最后，在统一的比较池中根据图文相对对齐、文本信息量、歧义度等进行综合评分，选择视觉贴合度高、语义密度高的标注，剔除歧义性、泛化性、对齐性弱的样本。 对于视频数据，管道首先将长视频分割成连续的短片段，并对代表性帧进行统一采样，然后使用语义和运动一致性来过滤和保留有效片段。 最后，它将局部帧级细节字幕与全局时间语义字幕相结合，生成具有变换感知能力的视频注释，使模型能够从连续场景中学习更鲁棒的视觉表示。

数据效率的提升直接体现在结果上。 TuringViT 仅使用了 0.85B 图像文本对，约为训练 SigLIP2-L 所用数据规模的十分之一，但在 ImageNet-1K 等六个零样本分类基准上实现了 83.6% 的平均准确率，超过了在 10B 数据上训练的主流开源基线。 在COCO和Flickr30K上的图文检索任务中也表现出了显着的优势，真正实现了用十分之一的数据获得更好的结果的突破。

在训练过程中，TuringViT采用四阶段渐进式原生动态分辨率训练范式，从预训练的第一天开始适应下游VLM和VLA的输入特性，彻底摆脱了固定分辨率预训练然后事后适应的传统模式。
